# extra_ids corpus (Blocks 9/10 self-distinct + checksummed). Synthetic.

# === Long-tail identifiers ===
# ORCID/ISIN are checksum-gated; the rest are self-distinct.
# expect: ORCID iD
0000-0002-1825-0097
# expect: ISIN
US0378331005
# expect: otpauth TOTP/HOTP URI
otpauth://totp/ACME:alice@acme.com?secret=JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP&issuer=ACME
# expect: BitLocker Recovery Key
123456-234567-345678-456789-567890-678901-789012-890123
# expect: EU Digital COVID Certificate
HC1:NCFOXN%TSMAHN-H3ZSUZK+.V0ET9X8KESABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ012345
# expect: Credential-bearing URL
https://admin:S3cr3tP4ss@db.internal.example/health
# expect: Classification Banner
TOP SECRET//SI//NOFORN
